actionUnits.condition: Manual invocation of Toggle() on MonoBehaviour id=2061883187 (guid=b61f5fbd6df31704b851371ab42625b2) attached to GameObject 'Point Light' (fileID=2061883183). Scene shows m_IsActive=0 initially; expected behavior: gameObject.SetActive(true). Second manual invocation of Toggle() on the same MonoBehaviour id=2061883187 (guid=b61f5fbd6df31704b851371ab42625b2) after the object has been activated by the prior step; expected behavior: gameObject.SetActive(false).
